ip.title: IP-adres van de Xenia
ip.description: Het lokale IP-adres van je Xenia espressomachine op het netwerk.

pollInterval.title: Status polling interval (seconden)
pollInterval.description: Hoe vaak de status van de machine wordt opgehaald.

waterTankSensor.title: Water Tank Sensor type

oneOf.title: None — only log, no HomeKit alert

waterTankSensor.description: How a low water tank should surface in HomeKit. The default 'Filter Maintenance' avoids the alarming 'Leak detected!' notification that LeakSensor produces.

exposeScripts.title: Expose machine scripts as buttons
exposeScripts.description: Create a momentary switch ('button') in HomeKit for each script stored on the machine (pressure profiles, pre-infusion, ...). Pressing it runs the script. Create the scripts on the machine first; the plugin only executes them and logs the available script ids at startup.
